name: Lemon Dill Meatballs with Artichokes
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds raw ground turkey or chicken
1 tablespoon chopped fresh dill or 1 tsp. dried dill
2 one pound cans artichoke hearts, halved
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak bread in milk.
2. Mash with fork.
3. Add ground turkey, onion, eggs, dill (or dried dill), grated lemon rind, salt, and pepper. Mix well.
4. Refrigerate for at least 1 hour or more.
5. With damp hands, roll into 32 meatballs, about 2 tablespoons each.
6. Combine chicken broth and water in a large frying pan.
7. Bring to a boil.
8. Add meatballs in one layer. Lower heat.
9. Simmer, covered, for 15 minutes.
10. Remove meatballs with a slotted spoon and place in a serving dish. Cover.
11. Strain liquid into a measuring cup.
12. Add water to make 4 cups.
13. Melt margarine in the same pan.
14. Add flour. Cook until bubbly, about 1 minute, stirring in the poaching liquid, lemon juice, and capers.
15. Pour over meatballs and artichoke hearts (drained and halved).
16. When ready to serve, microwave until heated through.
17. Garnish with parsley and lemon twists.
To Freeze:
1. Spoon 4 meatballs, a few artichoke pieces, and sauce into individual boilable bags.
2. Label, date, and freeze up to 2 months.
3. Place bags in boiling water in a medium saucepan.
4. Boil for 15 minutes.
5. Serve over rice.
